<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.0.3 Chrome/140.0.7339.249 Electron/38.7.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.0.3" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="Lo5lXYAB2x9856fm2ZH7"> <mxGraphModel dx="2605" dy="1890" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1100" pageHeight="850" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" value="" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="433.09" y="6080" width="1340" height="1260" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" value="User asks open-ended
diagnostic question" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;arcSize=50;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="903" y="6100" width="334.14" height="80.57" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" value="1. Restate symptom" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#f9f7ed;strokeColor=#36393d;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="545.48" y="6260" width="273.18" height="60.49" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" value="2. loki-labels

signal?" style="rhombus;strokeWidth=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;fontColor=#333333;strokeColor=#666666;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1375.84" y="6540" width="194.16" height="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="9" value="5. loki-query
follow trace_id
across containers" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#f9f7ed;strokeColor=#36393d;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1338.14" y="6833.21" width="268.06" height="114.26" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" value="User asked
'how much/fast'?" style="rhombus;strokeWidth=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;fontColor=#333333;strokeColor=#666666;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="970.1564201183432" y="6779.996016362493" width="220.6807988165681" height="220.67967275015735" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" value="6. loki-query
rate / quantile_over_time" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;fontFamily=Cascadia code light;fontSize=20;shadow=1;fillColor=#f9f7ed;strokeColor=#36393d;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1151.73" y="7070" width="348.27" height="87.38" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" value="7.
